user.title: SolArk Cloud Account
user.description: Enter your SolarkCloud credentials and plant ID. Find your plant ID in your SolarkCloud URL: https://www.solarkcloud.com/plants/overview/{PLANT_ID}/...

data.timezone: Timezone (e.g. America/Detroit). Leave blank to use Home Assistant timezone.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Please check your email and password.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to SolarkCloud. Please try again later.
